subject: (no subject)
body:
I LOVE YOU<< SORRY  IT"S BEEN SO TENSION FILLED.   note.. Kathy said she would never use a bottled sauce , except as a small addtion to a home made sauce. She said she told you about dean and deluca freshly made sauces.. She added that the only recipe that would call for the use of  bottled sauce would be in the cookbook, under  the title " DO  YOU really  Want to have a bad day,"..,  Lance said he makes the sauce , (no bottle) and you might recall that Mark the chef got fired  five minutes after  he served that. I LOVE YOU VERY MUCH>


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
